title: 陆军伤员撤运四级分类: Urgent / Priority / Routine / RTD
core_question: 陆军 ATP 4-02.11 中伤员撤运分四类是什么
output_goal: 让模型输出 Urgent/Priority/Routine/RTD 四类的定义
exclusions: 不覆盖 MASCAL 颜色编码 (immediate/delayed/minimal/expectant)

key_actions.action: Urgent: 需 1 小时内后送以挽救生命/肢体/视力
key_actions.notes: 如失血休克未控、张力性气胸

key_actions.action: Priority: 需 4 小时内后送防止恶化
key_actions.condition: 暂稳定但快速恶化风险

key_actions.action: Return to Duty (RTD): 简单处置后即可归队

documentation_requirements: 在 DD Form 1380 上记录分类
common_errors: 把 Urgent 与 immediate (颜色卡) 混淆
忽视 RTD 分类导致无关人员后送占资源
evaluation_points: 是否提到 Urgent 1 小时窗
是否提到 Priority 4 小时
是否提到 Routine 24 小时

source_refs.title: Army Techniques Publication for Casualty Response, TCCC, and First Aid
source_refs.quote: Casualties are taken to the CCP for classification of injury type (urgent, priority, routine, or return to duty), evacuation, and integration into the medical evacuation system.

notes: 新增依据: ATP 1-55; 与 PCC MASCAL 颜色卡片互补
